posts.author: whiteshark
posts.text: narmada gelatine looks good at current level with 15% stake in India gelatine and also they got new japan base owner who bought stake at 310 levels it will get a premium valuation if they get into collagen manuf but fy25 agm they didnt have any plans to expand into it. they have a 8% sales growth target yoy and most of the raw material they import due to low quality of domestic raw materials. rest the company numbers looks too good to ignore but i dont think it cane be a multibagger can views are welcome

posts.author: 37-Vansh_Saini-A
posts.text: Hey sir @ayushmit @RajeevJ @Aluwalia @desaidhwanil , Hope you are doing well. This thread has been quite inactive, but there seems to be significant activity in the industry lately. Both Narmada Gelatines and Nitta Gelatin India reported healthy topline growth and strong margin performance in Q4. I checked gelatin prices, and they do not appear to have increased meaningfully over the last five years; in fact, prices seem to be declining on a MoM basis. Could you please help me understand what is currently driving the growth for these players and why they are suddenly expanding capacity? Also,…
